# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "staging-sql-server"
  databaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "staging-database"
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  adminLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "sqladmin"
  adminPassword:
    type: secureString
    defaultValue: "AzureSQL2024!"
  developmentIPs:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - "192.168.1.1/32"
      - "192.168.1.2/32"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2022-02-01-preview
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('adminLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: 2022-02-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: 2022-02-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAllWindows')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
      endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: 2022-02-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/DevelopmentIPs')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[first(parameters('developmentIPs'))]"
      endIpAddress: "[last(parameters('developmentIPs'))]"

outputs:
  sqlDatabaseConnectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('databaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('adminLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('adminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
